_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: Commission Delegated Regulation 2024/1127 of 8 February 2024 sets guiding principles and criteria for in-service verification of CO₂ emissions. Type-approval authorities are responsible for verifying that certified CO₂ emission values correspond to those measured during in-service verification tests. To pass the test, measured CO₂ emissions must not exceed certified values by more than 7.5%.
prior.source_span: To pass the test, the measured CO 2 emissions must not exceed the certified values by more than 7.5%.
